work_unit: MONI-API-002: cap replay/backtest frames to prevent memory-exhaustion DoS
situation: audit-2026-07-07-028 finding MONI-API-002 (medium, route-fix): POST /replay/sessions and POST /backtest/run accept unbounded frames Vec; single request with millions of frames consumes unbounded heap during deserialization. Derived fix pending dispatch per audit-cycle-state._status_note.
action: Added MAX_FRAMES_PER_REQUEST=10_000 const + early-reject guard in both create_replay_session and run_backtest handlers. Returns ApiError::bad_request with count+limit message when exceeded. Minimal 1-file change, no behavior change for legitimate requests under cap.
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh committed + pushed auto/opt-moni-api-1783359370 to origin (new branch). git diff shows +18 lines, 0 deletions. Both handlers guarded. Const documented with audit finding reference.
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending derived_fix: MC-001 (symlink TOCTOU on new-file leaf in resolve_storage_path, paths.rs:65, medium route-fix). 之后 COGALPHA-05 (unbounded LLM output parsing, llm.rs:183, low).

audit_findings.finding: Unbounded replay/backtest frames ingestion — memory exhaustion DoS vector (MONI-API-002 from audit-2026-07-07-028)
audit_findings.remediation: Cap frames.len() at 10k via MAX_FRAMES_PER_REQUEST const; reject over-limit with bad_request before deserialization completes
